introSection: Rollies Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at Morey's Piers in Wildwood, New Jersey, USA. It opened in 1999. In 2021, the coaster was dismantled and refurbished.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Orange track and grey supports, used to be red track and grey supports.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The ride uses the final design of car with over-the-shoulder restraints.

fullText:
Rollies Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at Morey's Piers in Wildwood, New Jersey, USA. It opened in 1999. In 2021, the coaster was dismantled and refurbished.



Orange track and grey supports, used to be red track and grey supports.

The ride uses the final design of car with over-the-shoulder restraints.
